CAS.TITLE: Concrete Plant Automation
CAS.SUBTITLE: A professional process to transform your plant with industrial technology
CAS.CTA_SUBTITLE: Schedule a free technical visit and receive a personalized assessment

STEP_1.TITLE: On-Site Diagnosis
STEP_1.DESCRIPTION: We visit your plant to conduct a comprehensive analysis of operational processes.

STEP_2.TITLE: Technical Proposal
STEP_2.DESCRIPTION: We design a customized solution with detailed technical specifications.

STEP_3.TITLE: Project Quotation
STEP_3.DESCRIPTION: We provide a detailed quotation with different implementation options.

STEP_4.TITLE: Implementation
STEP_4.DESCRIPTION: We install IoT hardware and configure the control systems.

STEP_5.TITLE: Training & Support
STEP_5.DESCRIPTION: We train your team and provide continuous support.

MODULES.TITLE: Features by License
MODULES.SUBTITLE: Each license unlocks specific modules to digitize key aspects of your operation

MODULE_1.TITLE: Order generation.
MODULE_1.DESCRIPTION: Within this module, create and manage orders digitally from your mobile device.
MODULE_1.FEATURE_1: Fast capture from mobile or web - Sales reps create field orders in <2 minutes
MODULE_1.FEATURE_2: Instant quotes with dynamic pricing - Rates by customer, volume, and project
MODULE_1.FEATURE_3: Automatic credit validation - Real-time approval based on the customer's credit limit
MODULE_1.FEATURE_4: Smart delivery scheduling - Calendar with plant and fleet availability
MODULE_1.FEATURE_5: Real-time tracking - Customers see status: captured → scheduled → in production → on route
MODULE_1.FEATURE_6: Inventory and production integration - Automatic synchronization with plant and warehouse

MODULE_2.TITLE: Delivery ticket generation.
MODULE_2.DESCRIPTION: Eliminate paperwork and fully digitize the delivery process with on-site customer signatures, photo evidence, and automatic sending via email or WhatsApp.
MODULE_2.FEATURE_1: Automatic generation from the dosing system - No manual input, zero human errors
MODULE_2.FEATURE_2: Real production data - Exact volume, formula, times, and materials consumed
MODULE_2.FEATURE_3: Multiple formats: PDF, JSON, XML - Direct download or programmatic integration
MODULE_2.FEATURE_4: RESTful API for automation - Connect with ERP, SAP, or proprietary systems
MODULE_2.FEATURE_5: Full batch traceability - From dosing to delivery with GPS timestamp
